title: API: POST+PATCH /api/profile (create + partial update + validation)

task.description: Extend /api/profile route to support POST create and PATCH partial update with strict validation per SPEC. Prevent duplicates (one profile per user) and return NOT_FOUND on PATCH when the profile row is missing.
acceptance_criteria: POST with valid input creates a row and returns 200 with profile.nickname exactly equal to request.nickname.
POST when a profile already exists returns 400 with error.code==='VALIDATION_ERROR'.
POST with invalid ageGroup (e.g., '10s') returns 400 with error.code==='VALIDATION_ERROR' and error.fields.ageGroup as a non-empty string.
PATCH when no profile exists returns 404 with error.code==='NOT_FOUND'.

definition_of_done: Validator enforces nickname length 1..30 and enum membership for all enum fields.
Handlers return only contract fields and camelCase keys.
No unauthenticated access path exists (401 on missing session).
